message:
fix(dolt): add connection timeouts to prevent agent hangs

The MySQL DSN had no timeout parameters, so when Dolt server hangs,
agents block forever on the TCP socket. The 30s retry backoff only
triggers after an error — a hung connection never errors.

Adds timeout=5s (connect), readTimeout=10s, writeTimeout=10s to
buildServerDSN(). These surface as retryable "i/o timeout" errors,
which the existing retry logic already handles with exponential backoff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
